title: ophryoscleria riparia
intro: Ophryoscleria riparia, commonly known as a type of aquatic plant, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being.
